title: Hoof Boot Winter Studs Pack
text: [SHORT DESCRIPTION] Cavallo Hoof Boot Studs provide your horse with better traction in slippery conditions such as ice, mud and snow. [PRODUCT TABS] Full description --- The Cavallo Guarantee --- Have a Finer-Boned Horse? Trek is the perfect boot! The Trek and ELB (Entry Level Boots) are the best choices for finer-boned horses. Both styles have a unique front-closure system that allows for an extra-snug fit on the upper portion of the boot – creating a very secure fit. On a finer-boned animal, the wrap-around Velcro closures can be drawn to the front and angled downward when the boot is being fastened, creating an almost “V” neck at the boot collar, tightening the fit: --- Cavallo Hoof Boot Studs provide your horse with better traction in slippery conditions such as ice, mud and snow. Package includes 12 studs (enough for one pair of boots). Please note: For LEB (Long Ear Donkey Boots), we recommend 4 studs per boot for optimal traction and performance. When your studs are no longer required, simply put your drill in reverse to remove them until next time. Things to keep in mind about Cavallo Hoof Boot Studs: Make sure your boots fit well, and your horse is acclimated to wearing them before you apply studs Always apply studs to both boots for proper balance Do not turn horses out wearing studded boots. A frolicking horse can injure itself and others with studded boots. When dri

title: Support Pads (Sold in pairs)
text: Cavallo Support Pads – Sold in Pairs The Cavallo Support Pads are designed to protect and support your horse during high-intensity, everyday work. Moulded from an industrial-grade thermoplastic urethane (TPU) compound, these pads deliver exceptional durability, cushioning, and shock absorption. When inserted into your horse’s Cavallo Hoof Boots, Support Pads reduce impact and concussion, minimize fatigue, and help keep your horse comfortable and sound. Support Pads are ideal for horses in regular work, thanks to their tough yet protective construction. They are highly recommended for road riding on pavement or asphalt, working over rocky or uneven terrain, and for everyday use in the arena. Cavallo’s advanced TPU technology ensures reliable performance in all conditions, offering lasting comfort and protection. In addition to riding, Cavallo Support Pads are also valuable for rehabilitation. They can provide relief to horses recovering from laminitis, founder, navicular syndrome, thin soles, stone bruising, and more. Their durable, shock-absorbing design makes them an excellent choice for situations requiring extended wear, such as turnout or long-term hoof therapy.
